gene_function: Semaphorin-3A — extracellular axon guidance ligand. Directs UF projection axons to prefrontal target via growth cone repulsion.
CUB and Sushi multiple domains 1 — complement-mediated synaptic pruning precision during UF consolidation.
Microtubule-associated protein tau — organises axonal microtubules, determines axon diameter and myelination efficiency.
